CustomField.formula: NOT( AND( OR( ISNULL(TEXT(New_Shipping_Conditions__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(New_Shipping_Conditions__c)) ), OR( ISNULL(TEXT(New_Payment_term__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(New_Payment_term__c)) ), OR( ISNULL(TEXT(New_Customer_Group__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(New_Customer_Group__c)) ), OR( ISNULL(TEXT(New_Currency__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(New_Currency__c)) ), OR( ISNULL(TEXT(New_Account_Assessment__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(New_Account_Assessment__c)) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Is Change
